title: 2025/10/29 Primary Production subcommittee B

description: Wednesday, 29 October 2025 | Primary Production Animal Welfare (Regulations for Management of Pigs) Amendment Bill

This bill prolonged suffering for cows throughout their lifetimes and beyond. From when I was about 12 years old, I've been writing submissions as part of animal welfare processes in defense of pigs standing up against their inhumane treatment.
